# helpers

## Section Header

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### render_section_header

``` python

def render_section_header(
    title:str, # Section title text
    icon_name:str, # Lucide icon name (kebab-case)
)->Any: # Header element with icon and title

```

*Render a section header with icon.*

``` python
from fasthtml.common import to_xml

hdr = render_section_header("Documents", "file-text")
xml = to_xml(hdr)
assert "file-text" in xml or "svg" in xml
assert "Documents" in xml
print(xml[:200])
```

    <h3 class="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewbox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-

## Action Buttons

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### render_icon_button

``` python

def render_icon_button(
    icon_name:str, # Lucide icon name (kebab-case)
    label:str, # Accessible label text
    color:str=None, # DaisyUI button color class (e.g., btn_colors.error)
    size:str=None, # DaisyUI button size class (e.g., btn_sizes.sm)
    kwargs:VAR_KEYWORD
)->Any: # Button element with icon

```

*Render a button with an icon and accessible label.*

``` python
b = render_icon_button("trash-2", "Delete", color=str(btn_colors.error), size=str(btn_sizes.sm))
xml = to_xml(b)
assert 'title="Delete"' in xml
assert "btn" in xml
print(xml)
```

    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-error btn-sm" title="Delete"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewbox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="w-4 h-4"><path d="M10 11v6"></path><path d="M14 11v6"></path><path d="M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6"></path><path d="M3 6h18"></path><path d="M8 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"></path></svg></button>

## Status Badges

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### render_media_type_badge

``` python

def render_media_type_badge(
    media_type:str, # Media type string (e.g., "audio")
)->Any: # Badge element

```

*Render a badge for media type display.*

``` python
b = render_media_type_badge("audio")
xml = to_xml(b)
assert "audio" in xml
assert "badge" in xml
print(xml[:200])
```

    <span class="badge badge-outline badge-sm">audio</span>

## Alert Messages

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### render_alert

``` python

def render_alert(
    message:str, # Alert message text
    color:str=None, # DaisyUI alert color class (e.g., alert_colors.success)
    alert_id:str='', # Optional HTML ID for the alert
)->Any: # Alert element

```

*Render a DaisyUI alert message.*

``` python
a = render_alert("Document deleted.", color=str(alert_colors.success), alert_id="my-alert")
xml = to_xml(a)
assert "Document deleted." in xml
assert 'id="my-alert"' in xml
assert 'role="alert"' in xml
print(xml[:200])
```

    <div role="alert" id="my-alert" class="alert alert-success">
    <span>Document deleted.</span></div>
